text: There is an uncanny silence here, pierced only by the low hum of fluorescent lights and the faint echo of my own footsteps. The glass doors and the dim glow of safety signs evoke a sense of abandonment, as if this place has temporarily slipped out of the flow of daily life. The second space, with its large "R+D" inscription and shadowy displays, hints at the pursuit of knowledge and innovation—yet now feels abandoned, with ideas left waiting in the gloom. I feel both curious and uneasy, poised on the edge of discovery or disquiet.
